use_cases: Displaying feature highlights with animated grid background
Showcasing product or service cards in SaaS dashboards
Creating visually striking pricing tier cards
Building content cards with interactive hover states
Designing grid-based layouts with decorative backgrounds
ai_summary: A decorative card component featuring a dynamic grid pattern background with a conic gradient glow effect that animates on hover. The card has a subtle gradient border, smooth transitions, and creates a visually appealing hover state with blur effects. Ideal for SaaS dashboards, feature showcases, and modern content grids where visual hierarchy and interactivity are important.
